description: Black handbag with two short handles woven through metallic loops, red animal print synthetic leather panel in front with stitch details on its sides, two vertical zipped pockets on each side of the panel with elongated zipper straps for style, two strap and buckle details on the sides attached to the front and back for a compact look, one metallic brand badge hanging from one of the handles and one fixed in the front, one main zippered compartment with two slots and an inner zipped pocket in between, an organiser sleeve on one side and a zipped pocket on the other, one external zipped pocket at the back
